title: Cestrd Technology Transfer
content: Technology Transfer Maintenance of three biogas reactors installed at 3BRD Air Force Station Chandigarh. (20 April, 2022) Installation of Biogas Reactor at Chitkara University Baddi, Solan (18 February 2022) Installation of Biogas Reactor at 3BRD Air Force Station Chandigarh. (September 2020 and online consultancy in 2021) Visit to Biogas plant of Pooghat School for Maintenance of Biogas digester Fabrication and Installation of a biogas reactor at Govt. Senior Secondary Girls School, Solan, HP : 20 September, 2019 Development of vermicompost for horticulture wing of JUIT: 01 June, 2019 Training on Working of Biogas Reactor, Govt. Senior School, Burmana, Bilaspur, H.P.: 08 April, 2019 Maintenance of biogas reactor installed a Govt. Primary School Pooghat, Distt. Solan, H.P. Formation of charcoal briquettes from pine needles (Jan. 2019) Reinstallation of the biogas reactor at Govt. Senior Secondary School, Barmana, Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh : 31 October, 2018 Biogas Reactor for Marginal Families
